nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=118 beats='the city of Larkhaven at dusk, seen from the guild hall above Larkhaven Station, where the mountain tramway catches the last light; you, the newest junior member of the the Wayfinders' Guild, summoned by the signal horn; stationmistress Marsh tells the hall plainly that the city's founding archive, the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll, was lifted from the the Record Hall three nights ago and rides tonight in a freight car of the the Cloudline night express, which leaves at twelve minutes past nine and crosses the ridge line at dawn'>>

choices.label: Climb to the hall and hear the plan.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='Marsh raises the recovery order so the whole hall can read the seal: the union acts tonight within the law; an adult officer must present the the recovery order, and opening a sealed car takes the car's number plus one honest piece of cause; she names the union's safety law like a second seal, no junior rides an open gondola roof, ever, juniors read, count, signal, and speak while adults do all the climbing and carrying; the night cable-liner calls at five viaduct stations, and its one long stop is the midnight water-stop at Highpass Junction, twenty-four minutes'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the map table; Marsh chalks the night: three crews, one train, one night, working three vantages and converging on Highpass Junction, where she herself, stationmistress of Highpass Junction, will stand on the platform with the the recovery order from twenty to midnight; a courteous purser named Feld signed the freight manifest without reading it, she says, and a frightened junior clerk rides with the cargo; the union recovers, it does not raid; nothing angrier than paper and lamplight, if the night goes right'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='the sorting of the crews; Route-Warden Farro, dry and exact, leads the Planners from the the survey office: route boards, timetables, freight ledgers, the numbers that can open a sealed door; Rigger Quill, calm as ballast, leads the Climbers along the fixed the catwalks to the junction's service cradle: adults ride the lift basket, juniors belay, spot, and run the lanterns; Advocate Belden, who has never lost a parley, leads the Talkers aboard the night cable-liner itself with honest tickets: the parlor car, the purser's office, the conductor's parley; Marsh asks where you will serve until dawn, and the choosing is yours'>>

choices.label: Join the Planners under Route-Warden Farro.
Join the Climbers under Rigger Quill.
Join the Talkers under Advocate Belden.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the survey office over Larkhaven Central, all brass and lamp glass; the the Cloudline laid out on the route board as rows of small lights, the night cable-liner waiting below as lamp twelve; Farro hands out timetable cards like a dealer who has never lost'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the survey office's standing rule etched over the desk, one reading is a guess, two readings are proof; the night cable-liner's paperwork pulled and laid flat, freight ledger and wagon manifest side by side under the green lamp'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='two documents and one hour before departure; the weight ledger, columns of axle loads off the yard scale, and the wagon manifest, cars and cargos and consignees; Farro says pick your thread, numbers first or names first, because a night this short only unravels from one end at a time'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='ledger columns tallied with a card ruler, junior fingers walking the axle loads line by line; the night cable-liner declares forty-one tons behind the tender, neat as printed music'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='the survey office's own tally from the yard scale reads nine tons over the declaration; somewhere in the night cable-liner a car rides heavy and unclaimed; Farro's rule stares down from the wall, one reading is a guess, two readings are proof, while the departure bell rings across the yard; check the figure against the axle-counter at Windgap Trestle, or run with it now and buy a head start'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='waiting on the night cable-liner to pass Windgap Trestle at five past ten; the axle-counter's ticker tape spools into a junior's hands while Farro mans the lamps, the survey office quiet as arithmetic'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='the tape shows the overload riding one truck: freight car six, third from the rear, and the heavy car has a number now; cause must reach Marsh before Highpass Junction spends itself; the the shuttle sled leaves in four minutes and reaches Highpass Junction by twenty to twelve, or the survey office can lamp-code the finding ahead through the Larkspur Relay relay and follow after'>>

choices.label: Ride the the shuttle sled to the junction.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the tram across the sleeping city with the ledger page wrapped in oilcloth; rooftops and dark canals below, and away east the night cable-liner's twin lamps threading the viaduct arches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='Larkspur Relay slides past beneath the tram at 11:18 sharp, mail sacks swinging aboard the night cable-liner in lamplight; the timetable holding like good masonry under the whole night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='Highpass Junction at twenty to midnight; Marsh on the platform with the the recovery order in its case, the relay mast dripping, and at the siding a loaded sledge with two porters'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='the night cable-liner sighs in at three minutes to midnight and Feld steps down, walking his tickets; Farro's crew lays the ledger and the Windgap Trestle tape before Marsh, cause and car number together; she asks the crew how the door should open: the the recovery order presented to Feld cold and formal, or the juniors laying the arithmetic in front of him first, since Farro holds that numbers are kinder than accusations'>>

choices.label: Let Marsh lead with the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the the recovery order presented under the platform clock; Feld reads it twice, hands not quite steady, and unlocks car six's man-door with the smallest bow of a long-serving man'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='lantern light in the freight car; crates of true glassware in the middle bay, and forward a bulkhead standing a hand-span proud; a junior finds a fresh solder line and six mismatched rivets'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='the porters' screwdrivers take the six painted thumb-screws and the panel comes away; behind it the three oilcloth chests, and behind them Jory Vance stands up out of the dark with his lantern, younger than his coat, saying he can name the buyer if anyone will listen before the constable writes him down; Marsh looks to the juniors who found the seam, her question plain: hear him now, or let the law go first'>>

choices.label: Ask Marsh to hear him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='Jory Vance's story spilling out onto a mail crate: the forged manifest, the pay he never spent, the standing order from the the Broker at the the Ridge Office naming other cities' archives; the constable writes, Marsh listens, and the relay mast tops the boiler off above them all'>>

choices.label: Stand by while the crates open.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the three oilcloth chests opened one by one on the platform: the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll with its ribbon intact; the night cable-liner released to roll on lighter at 12:21 exactly; Jory Vance to ride back with the union and tell the magistrate everything'>>

choices.label: See the archive onto the barrow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=104 beats='dawn from the guild hall above Larkhaven Station, the archive home under guard and Marsh signing the recovery into the union log; Farro pins the Windgap Trestle tape above the survey office desk as exhibit one of the lesson, two readings, one door, no shouting; the the Broker's name is already wired to the ridge line court before breakfast'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the junction constable, unhurried and correct, reads Jory Vance his particulars with no hand laid on him; the clerk carries one crate to the barrow himself, which the constable allows, because dignity costs a recovery nothing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the archive tallied crate by crate against the the recovery order's schedule under the platform lamps; Feld surrenders his manifest copy unasked; the night cable-liner rolls out at 12:21 with its whistle low, one lie lighter'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=112 beats='morning; the founding roll back in the the Record Hall and the magistrate's clerk reading the tally aloud; Farro observes that the law was enough tonight because the numbers came checked; a quiet pride that holds all the way to sleep'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the juniors spread the ledger and the Windgap Trestle tape on Feld's little desk; he follows the columns with a silver pencil, courteous as ever, complimenting the tallying like a man praising the rope that will tie him'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='the silver pencil stops on car six; Feld says softly that a purser signs a great many things, and forty years of service hang in the little office like a coat on its peg; the crew can press him gently, that helping the recovery makes a witness of him, or step back and let Marsh's the recovery order carry the weight so he need only stand aside'>>

choices.label: Step back for the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the appeal made gently: a man who helps the recovery tonight stands in the witness column, not the warning column; Feld asks whether the union speaks for honest witnesses, and the juniors answer with Marsh's own words from the hall'>>

choices.label: Walk with him to car six.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='Feld takes down his ring of keys and walks the platform to car six ahead of the the recovery order, unlocking the man-door under Marsh's eye and naming the false floor panel himself, quietly, like a debt'>>

choices.label: Stand by as the panel falls.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=98 beats='the panel down, the crates out, Jory Vance found sitting among the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll and treated gently; Feld writes his own statement in a round old hand; Farro tells the crew that arithmetic opened the door and mercy kept it open; dawn colors the viaduct as the archive rides home'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='Marsh presents the the recovery order formally at the man-door with the arithmetic laid out as cause; Feld stands aside with a bow that looks a great deal like relief'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the panel unscrewed by the porters, the crates checked against the the recovery order's schedule, Jory Vance taken into the constable's care with his lantern still lit; everything by the book, and tonight the book is enough'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=118 beats='the recovery logged in a column of signatures, the night cable-liner away at 12:21; Farro allows that there are nights when the quiet way is the fast way; the archive is home before the milk carts and the crew asleep before the gulls'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the survey office's lamp-code lesson, quick and exact, long flash and short; Farro warns that nine and four differ by a single flash and that a tired eye will lose it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the message away through the Larkspur Relay relay: HEAVY CAR NINE HOLD CAUSE AT JUNCTION; the relay's answering flicker crosses the dark city like a struck match'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='the crew follows on the quarter-past-eleven milk train, watching the junction answer the relay; the acknowledge comes back one long flash, but the repeat-back is smudged by chimney haze right on the car digit; protocol says a smudged repeat-back means send it all again, which costs ten minutes of the window; repeat the message in full, or trust that it went through'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the message sent twice more from the Larkspur Relay relay box, the junction's repeat-back coming clean at last: NINE, one long flash sitting exactly where it belongs'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the supply car limps into Highpass Junction at ten past midnight; the platform is already busy with lanterns, and none of the hurry looks like trouble'>>

<<FILL role=success words=108 beats='car six stands open; Marsh, with tape and ledger relayed true, presented the the recovery order on the lamp-code cause at the top of the window; the three oilcloth chests are on the barrow and Jory Vance sits quiet beside the constable; Farro points from the junction lamp to the survey office lamp and calls them one instrument; the archive rides the pilot engine home at one o'clock'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the supply car in at ten past midnight, and on the platform a wrongness: car eight stands open under the lanterns, mail sacks and stove parts, Feld apologizing beautifully to everyone at once'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='the smudged flash read four for nine, and the the recovery order spent its first courtesy on the wrong door; Feld is now within his rights to ask better cause before another seal breaks, and nine minutes of window remain; Farro owns the mistake without blinking and lays out two doors: wire Farrow Notch to hold the night cable-liner at the 2:40 stop, or board the night cable-liner with Marsh and ride the the recovery order to the ridge line gate'>>

choices.label: Board and ride for the ridge line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the window closes; the night cable-liner rolls at 12:21 with car six sealed; the wire to Farrow Notch goes out clean, but a two-minute stop is a narrow door for a the recovery order, a purser, and six painted thumb-screws'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the ninety-second stop at Farrow Notch; the night cable-liner barely breathes; Feld, correct now to the letter, requires the full form, and the form takes four minutes the stop does not have; the tail lamps shrink toward the ridge line hills'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=104 beats='dawn at the survey office; the night cable-liner crossed the ridge line with the archive still hidden, and Marsh files the the recovery order with the ridge line court before breakfast; Farro posts the smudged tape above the desk beside the rule it proves, and nobody shouts; the case will bring the crates home by a month of paperwork, and no junior of this crew will ever again trust a smudged repeat-back'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='riding the night cable-liner as lawful passengers with Marsh's the recovery order in her case; the long dark run past Farrow Notch while the juniors re-prove the cause from the raw tape at a dining-car table'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='by four in the morning the arithmetic stands solid; the conductor, shown the working, wires ahead to Highpass Gate on his own authority, and the ridge line wardens answer that the train will be held inside the gate'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=112 beats='at 5:41 the night cable-liner stands held inside Highpass Gate while wardens open car six on the wired cause; the crates come home; but in the the Ridge Office ledger the juniors glimpse the the Broker's standing order naming three more cities' archives, and the recovery ends as something larger begins; the union copies the page before the morning ink dries'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the raw overage grabbed and run with, the the shuttle sled caught at a sprint; the survey office shrinking behind, the rule still on its wall, and the number warm and unchecked in a junior's pocket'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='on the tram the juniors re-derive the car from memory against a borrowed timetable, and the scale column lands, uneasily, on car three; nobody says the word rumor out loud'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='Highpass Junction at twenty to midnight; Marsh reads the unchecked figure pointing at car three and her question is gentle and heavy: is this number checked twice, because a the recovery order's first courtesy spends only once; the truthful answer is no; admit it and spend the window's first minutes re-checking against Feld's own scale book, or stand on the figure and open car three'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the admission out loud and plain; Marsh nods as if a door has passed a test, and Feld, asked courteously, produces his own scale book, because the request is small and honest'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='two juniors race the columns under the platform lamp while the night cable-liner takes water; the mis-scaled line surfaces, a doubled decimal in the seventh column, and the corrected total lands on car six'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the Windgap Trestle tape, wired ahead by the survey office on its own initiative, arrives to second the correction; two readings at last, with four minutes of margin in the window'>>

choices.label: Present the the recovery order once, rightly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the the recovery order presented once and rightly; the man-door open, the false floor panel found by its fresh paint line, the porters' screwdrivers busy while the boiler tops off'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='the three oilcloth chests on the barrow at 12:19 and the night cable-liner released on time; Jory Vance walks to the lamp room between Marsh and the constable with his dignity intact; Farro gives the crew the night's true ledger, that a mistake admitted at speed weighs less than a doubt carried to a door; the archive sleeps at home'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='opening car three on an unverified guess: milled glass and stove iron, honestly manifested; Feld's courtesy acquires a fine polish as he notes that the the recovery order's cause is spent'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='Highpass Junction ends with car six sealed and the night cable-liner rolling into the dark; on the emptying platform Farro takes the blame onto his own page in front of the crew, before anyone else can reach for it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=118 beats='the long tram ride home; at the survey office Farro chalks the rule bigger, one reading is a guess, two readings are proof, and beneath it the juniors chalk what it cost; the ridge line court takes the case at dawn with the corrected arithmetic attached, and the archive will come home by law, later and lawyer-slow, with the crew there when it does'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the wagon manifest read aloud down its column, coal, mail, milled glass; car six listed GLASSWARE FRAGILE for Highpass Gate, riding third from the rear'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the line read twice the survey office way; glassware heavy enough to crush its springs, sealed at Central by a junior clerk's hand, and bound for a border gate at dawn'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='the oddity found by a junior's finger: car six's consignee line is blank, and freight for a border crossing never rides unclaimed; Farro goes very still, the way he does at a good number; the blank line is a thread with two ends: the telegraph office keeps duplicate waybills that could name who paid, or the blank line itself can ride straight to Marsh as thin but honest cause'>>

choices.label: Trace it at the telegraph office.
Take the blank line to Marsh.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the telegraph office off the concourse, warm with resin and dust; the night clerk glad of quiet company, pulling duplicate flimsies from the wire baskets under green glass'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='car six's booking on its flimsy: paid in coin, no sender named, routed care of the the Ridge Office, Highpass Gate; a shipment ashamed of both its ends'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='the same fist, the clerk says, has booked storage at the the Ridge Office twice before, a standing order with its far end across the ridge line; the finding can travel two ways: by official wire to the ridge line warden, formal and slow but arriving with the telegraph seal's weight, or in the crew's own hands by the shuttle sled to Marsh before midnight'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the wire drafted with the clerk's help in proper form, GATE HOUSE CONSIGNMENT CAR NINE RECOVERY WRIT FOLLOWS, and away south under the telegraph seal'>>

choices.label: Ride the supply car after it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the crew reaches the junction on the supply car as Highpass Junction opens; Marsh already holds the warden's answer, cause seconded from the ridge line itself, heavy as a second signature'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='car six opens to the the recovery order without a raised voice; the false floor panel, the three oilcloth chests, and a tired clerk found sitting on the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll with his lantern turned low'>>

choices.label: Pin the reply to the board.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=108 beats='crates home and Jory Vance gently in hand; pinned to the union board a copy of the warden's reply, which Farro calls the rarest kind of night, one where the paperwork arrived before the trouble; the standing order goes to the magistrate to be unpicked city by city'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the flimsy wrapped in oilcloth and the tram across the roofs; Larkspur Relay below at 11:18 with its mail sacks swinging aboard the night cable-liner, everything on time except the truth'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the junction at twenty to twelve; Marsh reads the the Ridge Office routing and sets it beside the blank consignee line, two halves of one lie fitting like tally sticks'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the night cable-liner in at three to midnight; the the recovery order presented on doubled cause; Feld reads the flimsy and his courtesy folds into something older and sadder, and he unlocks the man-door himself'>>

<<FILL role=success words=104 beats='the false floor panel down, the three oilcloth chests out, the founding roll untied and counted page by page under the relay mast; Jory Vance names the the Ridge Office without being asked twice; the night cable-liner rolls on time and the archive rides the pilot engine home, with Farro granting that names, tonight, were faster than numbers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the tram to the junction with the manifest folded to the blank line; the aqueduct's dark arches keeping pace alongside, mile after quiet mile'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='Highpass Junction at twenty to midnight; Marsh at her platform desk with the the recovery order in its case, and at the siding a loaded sledge with two porters waiting with two bored porters and a stack of empty crates sized to swallow other crates'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='eleven fifty-seven and the night cable-liner sighs in; the lantern swinging clear of the pylon swings out over the tender and twenty-four minutes go on the clock; Marsh calls the blank line honest cause but thin, and a the recovery order spends best with a second thread; stake the the recovery order now and open car six at once, or hold four minutes for the other crews' word, trusting the union's own plan to converge'>>

choices.label: Stake the the recovery order on it now.
Hold for the crews to converge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the the recovery order presented on the blank line alone; Feld hesitates a half-breath too long and stands aside; the man-door opens on lantern dark and the smell of new paint'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the false floor panel found and unscrewed, the crates there and true; but the car's far door swings on its hinges, and Jory Vance is gone up the train among the passengers while the porters lift the panel down'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=112 beats='the archive comes home whole, which is the night's work done; but the clerk who could name the the Broker reaches Highpass Gate in a borrowed seat among strangers, and the juniors learn that a recovery's second half rides on in the Talkers' country; on the union board the blank consignee line waits, half a name, half a question'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='four minutes of held breath; then Quill's the catwalks lantern spells PANEL SEEN and a Talker runner brings Feld's manifest copy signed unread; the thin cause turns thick as rope'>>

choices.label: Present the the recovery order on three threads.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the the recovery order presented once, on three crews' cause; car six opens without argument to the panel, the crates, and Jory Vance found sitting on the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll with his lantern, too tired to run'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the tally run under the relay mast while the boiler drinks; the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll with its ribbon; the night cable-liner released at 12:21 to the second'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='the convergence Marsh chalked at dusk lands exactly at midnight with every crew's thread in the knot; the archive is home before two, and in the union log Farro writes the whole night up under one word, together, which from Farro is a speech'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the tackle house under the Central the catwalks; Quill issuing harnesses sized small and checking every buckle twice; a wall of coiled lines, and her voice like slow water naming each junior's station for the night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the harness lesson given until it sits in the bones: two clamps or nothing, and the second anchor is the one that holds you; juniors belay, spot, and signal; only adults ride steel, tonight and every night'>>

choices.label: Follow Quill up the the catwalks stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the climb up the fixed stair to the the catwalks walk, clipped to the rail the whole way; the city opening below, canals like dropped ribbon, and far off the the mountain tramway's twin lamps threading the dark'>>

choices.label: Walk the aqueduct service way east.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the long walk east along the aqueduct service way, the old water-channel's maintenance path running arch for arch beside the the mountain tramway; Larkspur Relay passes below at 11:18 with its mail-sack swing, right on the card'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='arrival above Highpass Junction at half past eleven; the relay mast, the siding with its waiting dray cart, Marsh's lamp already on the platform, and the lift basket hanging from the relay mast the catwalks like a patient spider'>>

choices.label: Report to the lift basket head.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='Quill at the lift basket head with forty minutes in hand and one crew; two useful hours ago she would do both, tonight it is one: rig the lift basket's line properly to her law, both anchors and full checks, or first walk the crew out the footbridge to scout the freight sightlines while the yard lamps last'>>

choices.label: Rig the lift basket by the law.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the rigging done right and slow, two anchors set in separate steel and each tugged to a count of ten; juniors pay out the belay line from the platform winch drum, learning the brake lever's two positions by feel'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the test drop with a sandbag rider; the brake bites clean; Quill clips in as the night cable-liner's whistle sounds off the western arches, 11:57 to the minute'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='Quill rides the lift basket down through lamplight to hang beside car six's roofline; below, the platform business of water bags and tickets goes on, and the freight car's roof lies dark with one wired-shut ventilator cowl'>>

choices.label: Hold the lift basket at the roofline.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='Quill hangs level with car six's roof, juniors on winch and lantern below; her hand-signals up the line offer two doors: the roof ventilator, a clean look into the car with a lantern relay from the platform, or the side inspection hatch, faster to reach but needing cradle slack right over the platform lamps where any porter might look up'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the lift basket walked two arm-lengths over the roofline; juniors angle the big platform lantern on Quill's finger-counts, light going up through the cowl in three short washes'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='through the vent Quill reads the car like a page: true glassware crated in the middle bay, and forward a bulkhead standing a hand-span proud of the frame where no bulkhead should stand'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the second pass catches it: a fresh solder line and six mismatched rivets, and the corner of a green crate stenciled white; cause, hanging thirty feet over the platform'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='cause must travel from the catwalks to the recovery order; the the catwalks lamp can code it to Marsh fast and public, letters of light over the whole junction for anyone to read, or two runners can take the relay mast stairs down with Quill's sketch of the seam, slower and surer and quiet; the lantern swinging clear of the pylon has minutes left in it either way'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the the catwalks lamp spelling PANEL SEEN CAR NINE in careful longs and shorts across the junction; Marsh's platform lamp answers UNDERSTOOD, and heads begin to turn at the talking light'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='among the turned heads, Feld's; the purser looks up the relay mast a long moment, then crosses the platform with his courteous walk while the lantern swinging clear of the pylon swings back off the tender'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='Feld calls up the the catwalks stair, politely, that inspections of railway property want railway notice, and what is the union's business aloft; Quill's rule is that the union does not lie, and she leaves the answer to the crew on the platform: speak it straight down to him, the recovery order and cause and car six, or signal Marsh to come and answer for the union with the the recovery order in her hands'>>

choices.label: Let Marsh answer with the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the answer given plain from the platform rail: a recovery under the magistrate's the recovery order, cause seen through the ventilator, car six; Feld's courtesy goes very still, like water finding its level'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='Marsh arrives with the the recovery order before the silence ends; Feld, out-papered and strangely relieved, unlocks the man-door and asks only that the glassware be handled kindly'>>

choices.label: Follow the the recovery order inside.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the panel down and the three oilcloth chests in lantern light; Jory Vance stands up out of the dark saying he never learned how to want this; the constable is gentle, and the boiler goes on topping off overhead'>>

choices.label: See the crates onto the barrow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=118 beats='the archive rolled up the platform as the night cable-liner releases on time; Quill ropes the lift basket home and tells the crew the night's truth, that the best rigging done tonight was an honest answer given at height; dawn finds the founding roll back in the the Record Hall and the crew asleep in the tackle house among the coiled lines'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the the catwalks lamp spells ANSWER COMES; Marsh crosses with the the recovery order and the two adults speak under the relay mast while the crew holds the lift basket line steady overhead, brake set, breath held'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='from above, the parley reads like weather clearing; Feld's shoulders settle, keys come out, and the the catwalks sighting stands as cause while the man-door opens to the law'>>

choices.label: Bring Quill up and stand down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=108 beats='panel, crates, and a frightened clerk gathered into careful hands; the crew's part done exactly and no more; Quill logs the sighting in the rigger's book and writes beneath it that a crew that knows which words are whose gets home by two, and they do'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='Quill's pencil sketch of seam and screws dropped down in a weighted bag; two juniors take the relay mast stairs with it, boots quiet, the sketch warm as a coal against the night'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='on the half-landing, climbing fast with a lantern, Jory Vance himself, off the train for air or for escape, eyes gone wide at the sight of union harnesses; he stands between the runners and the platform, frightened enough to bolt and bury the panel deeper; speak to him gently from where you stand, no step closer, or ease back against the rail and lamp-flash the platform for the constable'>>

choices.label: Step back and flash for help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the words kept simple and the distance kept wide: the union has a the recovery order, the night has one good door left, and it is the one where he walks down first and tells it himself'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='Jory Vance comes down the stair ahead of the runners like a boy leaving a high dive, and at the bottom asks for Marsh by name; the sketch changes hands on the way down'>>

choices.label: Stand by while he tells it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=104 beats='Jory Vance opens the panel himself with his own screwdriver, naming the the Ridge Office and the the Broker while the constable writes; the crates come home with his testimony riding alongside; Quill tells the runners that the gentlest belay of the night was played out on a staircase, in words'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='backs to the rail and room left wide; the hand-lamp flashes the platform code for constable; Jory Vance freezes, then simply sits down on the step and waits, tired past running'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the constable comes up the stair unhurried; particulars taken on the half-landing without a raised voice; the sketch goes down to Marsh and the the recovery order meets the man-door as the lantern swinging clear of the pylon swings clear'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=112 beats='the recovery unrolls in good order, panel and crates and tally, nobody cornered and nobody chased; in the rigger's book Quill writes that the crew held two lines at once tonight, one of hemp and one of patience, and neither slipped'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the lift basket slacked and walked toward the car's flank, into the wash of the platform lamps; Quill's shadow thrown ten feet tall across car six's boards'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='a porter looks up, then another; a murmur crosses the platform like wind over water, and Feld's head turns; Quill signals hold, hanging in plain lamplight with the hatch a body-length away'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='seen is seen; Quill swings back to the the catwalks shadow and the crew reads the salvage: wait out the stir with the winch locked and buy the ventilator look late in the window, or drop the attempt now and carry the one thing already learned, that car six's springs ride crushed, down to Marsh as thin cause'>>

choices.label: Wait, then try the vent late.
Drop it and carry the springs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='minutes bought with stillness while the platform stir settles and the lantern swinging clear of the pylon does its slow work; 12:09 when Quill rides out again over the roofline'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the ventilator look, quick and clean this time: the false floor panel, the fresh paint line at the seam, a green stenciled corner behind it; cause, with the window thinning to minutes'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='12:15 by the relay mast clock and the watering nearly done; on the platform Marsh's lamp asks the the catwalks a single patient question, CAUSE; three minutes will not do everything: code the cause down by the catwalks lamp, fast and public and finished, or bring Quill to the platform in the lift basket to speak it herself, surer in the saying but slower than the last of the water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='PANEL SEEN CAR NINE FRESH PAINT SIX SCREWS; the light steady, the letters clean, and Marsh's answer already moving across the platform as the last word spells'>>

choices.label: Hold the light on the last word.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the the recovery order presented at the man-door on the lamp's word with ninety seconds of water left; Feld reads it and stands aside; the night cable-liner will leave on time and without its secret'>>

<<FILL role=success words=98 beats='panel, crates, and a clerk found sitting on the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll; the tally run under the relay mast as the night cable-liner rolls at 12:21 exactly; Quill tells the winch crew that a lamp is a rope for words, and tonight they paid it out without a kink; the archive sleeps at home before two'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the lift basket's slow descent to the platform, juniors braking by the count exactly as drilled; Quill steps off and walks to Marsh, speaking low and exact with the logbook open'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the lantern swinging clear of the pylon swings clear as she finishes; the relay mast clock gives the window nothing more; Marsh's hand rests on the the recovery order while the engine builds its leaving breath'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='Marsh, stationmistress of her own junction, can hold a watered train a short while on her authority if the cause is sound, and she asks the the catwalks crew straight, in front of everyone: was it seen true; say the cause is sound and stake the union's word on two seconds of lamplight, or admit the look was thin through a half-shut cowl and let her weigh it honestly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the answer given steady, seam, screws, stencil, and the times read off the logbook; Marsh reads faces the way Farro reads columns, and holds the night cable-liner at the platform on the stationmistress's board'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the the recovery order presented once; the man-door, the panel, the three oilcloth chests in lamplight; Jory Vance surrenders his screwdriver like a sword and looks mostly relieved'>>

<<FILL role=success words=118 beats='eleven minutes of held train and the archive on the barrow before the board flips; the night cable-liner away short one lie; Quill tells the crew the night turned on their two seconds of looking and the nerve to call it sound out loud; the rigger's book gets a full page'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the honest answer, two seconds and a lamp-wash; Marsh nods, lets the night cable-liner roll at 12:21, and has the junction wire Farrow Notch the sketch and the times before the tail lamps clear the arches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='Marsh offers the pilot engine standing warm on the siding; the crew packs the small cab among lamps and coiled line, and the night country runs backward with the night cable-liner's glow two arches ahead'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='Farrow Notch at 2:38, but the home signal stands against the pilot on a fouled block and the two-minute stop spends itself out of reach; Marsh names the last door, Highpass Gate at dawn, where the the recovery order still runs on the city side of the line; press on with her through the small hours to the ridge line parley, or wire Highpass Gate the whole cause from here and turn for home, trusting the wardens to act on paper alone'>>

choices.label: Press on to the ridge line.
Wire Highpass Gate and turn home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the long small hours behind the night cable-liner, the pilot running on Marsh's authority section by section; juniors sleeping in turns on coiled line while the ridge line hills go grey'>>

choices.label: Stand at the gate at dawn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='Highpass Gate at 5:41; the night cable-liner held inside the gate by wardens reading Marsh's the recovery order under lanterns going pale; car six's man-door opens on the city side of the ridge line by the width of a platform'>>

<<FILL role=success words=108 beats='the false floor panel down at sunrise, the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll lifted out while the the Ridge Office windows watch behind drawn curtains; Jory Vance, found in the parlor car with his coat buttoned wrong, chooses the union's side of the platform; the longest road home carries the heaviest proof, and the crew rides back asleep on the crates'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the whole cause wired from the Farrow Notch box, sketch described screw by screw; Highpass Gate acknowledges in a warden's steady fist, and the pilot turns for the city under a sky going slate'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the tackle house at dawn, harnesses on their pegs; then the junction telegraph chattering: EXPRESS HELD GATE PANEL FOUND CRATES SAFE; breakfast gathers around the message like a stove'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=104 beats='the archive comes home on the noon train under a warden's seal, recovered by strangers who trusted a sketch; the crew learns the night's quiet lesson, that a true report travels faster than any crew can ride and does its climbing alone; in the rigger's book Quill pastes the wire itself, the only page written in someone else's hand'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the lift basket roped home and the stairs taken down with the one hard fact the footplates gave for free: car six's springs sit crushed flat under a cargo of blown glass; heavy is honest, but heavy is not a seam'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='Marsh hears it and measures it and shakes her head: weight is cause to wonder, not cause to open; she will not spend the the recovery order's one courtesy on a maybe, and the window runs out with the crew grounded'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=112 beats='the night cable-liner rolls with its secret; but the springs datum, wired to the ridge line beside the Planners' ledger, is enough for the wardens to hold the train at dawn for a lawful look; recovery comes by relay, not by rescue, and the crew spends breakfast learning the difference and deciding they can live with it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='out along the fixed footbridge that spans the through line, clipped to the rail hand over hand; below, the junction lies like a map of itself, platform, water tower, and the siding where a loaded sledge with two porters stands loaded with empty crates under a the Ridge Office delivery board'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the scout's tally filling the logbook: the cart's crates sized to hide other crates, the porters bored and incurious, every sightline and lantern angle marked against the night cable-liner's arrival'>>

choices.label: Watch the night cable-liner come in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='11:57 and the night cable-liner in from the west; from the footbridge, car six reads wrong three ways: springs crushed flat, vent cowl wired half-shut from inside, and a smudge of rivet-grey paint low on the forward door edge'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='rich cause in the logbook, but the lift basket still hangs unrigged and the window is spending itself; go back and rig by the law, both anchors and every check, arriving over the car late but right, or rig a single anchor and buy the scouting minutes back'>>

choices.label: Rig one anchor to save time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the rigging done full and fast with no step skipped, Quill calling the checks and the juniors answering; the second anchor tugged to ten like always, because always is the point'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='Quill out over car six at 12:07 with the window half spent and the footbridge tally pinned to her sleeve; below, the lantern swinging clear of the pylon works its slow trade'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='the wired cowl fought open a finger's width and a lantern wash sent inside; the false floor panel there, the paint line there; the footbridge cause and the lift basket cause shake hands thirty feet up; minutes remain for exactly one telling: code the doubled cause to Marsh by the catwalks lamp and let the the recovery order walk, or bring Quill up and send her to the platform in person with the logbook, the surer, slower way'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the the catwalks lamp spells it twice for surety, cowl, seam, springs, smudge; Marsh's answer crosses the platform at a stationmistress's walk with the the recovery order already out of its case'>>

choices.label: Hold position for the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the man-door open at 12:16; porters' screwdrivers at the six painted screws; from above, the whole recovery fits in one lantern circle, panel, crates, and a clerk sitting down among the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll like his knees had quit'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the night cable-liner released to the second; the crew off the steel by half past; at the siding a loaded sledge with two porters still waits for a transfer that now belongs to the constable's notebook'>>

<<FILL role=success words=98 beats='the archive home before two and the logbook page pasted into the rigger's book beside the times; Quill's verdict read aloud to the tackle house, that scouting bought the cause and the law's rigging spent it, which is the whole craft in one night; the crew sleeps like anchors'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Quill up, unclipped, and down the stair with the logbook under her arm; the crew holds the the catwalks watch with lamps trimmed while the car below keeps its secret one more minute'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='on the platform the logbook opens page by page for Marsh and, deliberately, for Feld; the purser reads the smudge, the cowl, the springs, and his own signature on the manifest, and grows very quiet'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='Feld asks to see the door-edge himself, touches the tacky grey with one gloved finger, and stands aside before the the recovery order is even raised; some doors open from the keeper's side'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=118 beats='the panel down and the crates tallied while the boiler tops; Jory Vance gathered in gently, the constable's hand on his shoulder like a teacher's; the night cable-liner away on time; in the rigger's book Quill writes that evidence walked downstairs tonight and did the talking, and the crew adds the grey fingerprint page as proof'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='one clamp set and the second skipped, the scouting minutes singing in everyone's ears; Quill frowns at the arithmetic of it and lets the frown lose; the lift basket swings out'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='halfway down, the line jumps its sheave with a crack like a knuckle; the lift basket lurches and Quill swings hard, catches the the catwalks ladder with both hands, boots finding a rung, safe, shaken, forty feet of quiet below her'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='nobody hurt and nothing dropped, and the platform gone still and listening under the relay mast; the mishap happened on Marsh's junction, and the law says her equipment, her word; own it to her now, whole and at once, or quietly re-rig with both anchors and try to buy the look back before anyone asks'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the report made from the platform edge, single anchor, jumped sheave, no injuries; Marsh grounds the lift basket with one word and thanks the crew for bringing her the truth while it was still warm'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the crew finishes the night as lantern-bearers for other people's work, and from the platform watches the Talkers' parley carry the recovery through the man-door without them'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=108 beats='the archive comes home tonight, but not by the the catwalks; in the tackle house at dawn Quill sets the jumped sheave on the table where the second anchor should have hung and says only that the law is written in the shape of the nights it would have saved; the crew hears her, and next time the law will hold them forty feet above a platform, which is where laws live'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the second anchor going in with cold hands while the window drains; Quill stops mid-knot, looks at her own shaking fingers, and calls it herself: no, two anchors and no secrets, and she walks the crew down to tell it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the truth laid out too late to buy the minutes back; the lantern swinging clear of the pylon swings clear as they finish, and the night cable-liner rolls at 12:21 with car six sealed and the the catwalks's look never taken'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=104 beats='the recovery passes to the ridge line court's slow mill, the crates a month from home behind paperwork instead of thumb-screws; in the rigger's book Quill writes the whole of it, sheave, silence, and the cost of a quiet fix, and signs it; the crew learns that the failure that teaches rigging is cheaper than the one that teaches falling, and that both are dearer than telling'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='boarding the night cable-liner at Larkhaven Central with honest tickets, 9:05 on the platform clock; Belden in her plain good coat, the crew dressed as exactly what they are, junior mapmakers on a night errand'>>

choices.label: Find your seats before the whistle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Belden's three parley rules given over the seat backs as the night cable-liner pulls out at 9:12: ask before you judge; a lock opened by its keeper stays trusted; and never corner a frightened soul'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='twelve cars of night train, and listening is the crew's whole craft until midnight; the parlor car is where people talk over soup, and the sorting car is where paper talks off the hook; Belden will float between, and the juniors pick their post'>>

choices.label: Take a table in the parlor car.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='soup and the click of viaduct joints; Windgap Trestle's ninety-second stop at 10:05 with Feld walking tickets on the platform, courteous to every window in turn'>>

choices.label: Trade a look with the crew.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='an off-duty brakeman two tables down, grumbling into his bread that car six rides locked even against the purser, sealed at Central by a junior clerk with a manifest nobody countersigned; the grumble is a thread, and Belden's first rule says ask before you judge; draw the brakeman out with honest questions about his train, or keep the table quiet and send word back for Belden to work him herself'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='honest questions about couplings and grades, the kind railway men answer for free; the brakeman warms, and the story arrives on its own: Feld signed for car six sight unseen at Central, which in forty years he has never once done'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='more, into his bread: the clerk who sealed the car, young Sel, rides with it and takes his meals standing at the freight door, and the brakeman reckons the lad has not slept since Central'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='Belden hears it and decides the parley opens in the purser's office before Larkspur Relay; she asks the juniors which telling should open it: the brakeman's words, human and warm and hearsay, or the cold oddity the crew logged at boarding, car six sealed shut yet listed for Highpass Junction siding on the corridor board'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the purser's office, brass and blotting paper; Belden lays the story out gently with no names attached, while the juniors watch the purser's hands instead of his face, the way she taught them at boarding'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='Feld pours tea with perfect courtesy and his hands are wrong, too careful, a man carrying a full cup across forty years of service; Belden's glance hands the moment to the juniors, her way of teaching; the unsigned consignee line lies on the desk between them: press him on it gently now, one honest question, or fold the papers and wait for Aqueduct, where Marsh's the recovery order can carry the weight instead'>>

choices.label: Fold and wait for the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the question asked small and true: who is car six for, and why would glassware ride ashamed of its own address; Feld sets down the pot and looks at the night going past the window'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the silence Belden taught them never to break; inside it Feld says quietly that he did not ask because he was paid not to, and that he has been listening to that sentence all the way from Central'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='Feld asks the office, not quite looking at anyone, what happens to a man who opens a door he was paid to keep shut; the truthful answer belongs to the union: say plainly, yourselves, that the union speaks for honest witnesses, or step out and fetch Belden to set formal terms so the promise is a paper one'>>

choices.label: Fetch Belden to set formal terms.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the answer given as Marsh gave it in the hall: recovery, not revenge; witnesses stand in a different column from thieves, and the union reads its columns out loud'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='Feld takes up his keys like a man picking up his own name; at Highpass Junction he walks past his own manifest to the man-door of car six and opens it before Marsh has the the recovery order half out of its case'>>

<<FILL role=success words=112 beats='the false floor panel named by the man who was paid to forget it; crates, ledger, and a frightened clerk gathered in gently; Feld gives his statement in a round old hand, and Belden tells the crew that the second rule won the night, a lock opened by its keeper stays trusted, and that they should write it somewhere they will lose it and find it all their lives'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='Belden's terms, quiet and exact: witness standing offered and taken, everything said written down; the little office fills with the particular calm of things done properly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='at Highpass Junction the the recovery order, the manifest, and Feld's statement meet on Marsh's platform desk like tributaries; the man-door opens to all three at once'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='panel and crates and the founding roll counted twice; Jory Vance taken into care without a hand raised; the night cable-liner away on time; Belden's lesson over cocoa at the junction, that mercy which gets written down survives the morning, and the morning is where recoveries live'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the papers folded and the tea finished politely; Larkspur Relay slides past at 11:18 with its mail swinging aboard; the office parley adjourned, not lost'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='at 11:40 a junior on corridor watch sees lantern light through the freight-car door glass where no light should be, and Jory Vance kneeling at the forward bulkhead with a screwdriver; the sighting is cause if it is witnessed properly, and the freight vestibule is inside the train and lawful to stand in; go forward and witness it through the glass at a distance, or hold post as posted and send the report back for Belden to witness herself'>>

choices.label: Hold post and send for Belden.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the walk forward through sleeping cars, unhurried, tickets in hand like any passenger; the freight vestibule cold and loud with rail joints, the door glass a pane of black'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='through the glass, plain as a lit stage: Jory Vance at the forward bulkhead, screwdriver working a painted screw, three green crate-corners showing where the panel stands ajar, twelve minutes out of Aqueduct; he has not seen the watchers, and Belden's third rule stands guard, never corner a frightened soul; slip back and send for Belden so the witnessing becomes official, or open the vestibule door and speak first, kindly, before the junction crowds him with lanterns'>>

choices.label: Slip back and send for Belden.
Open the door and speak first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the report handed back in one taught sentence; Belden comes forward alone, stands at the door glass a full minute, and writes what she sees in her level hand while the junction lamps rise ahead'>>

choices.label: Let the adults take the door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='at Highpass Junction the the recovery order meets a witnessed cause; Marsh, Belden, and the constable enter the freight car together, lanterns low and voices lower; Jory Vance looks up from the half-open panel and simply sets the screwdriver down'>>

<<FILL role=success words=118 beats='the recovery whole by 12:15, panel, crates, ledger, and a clerk who never had to be chased; he tells the constable the watchers could have shouted and did not, and that this is why he stayed sitting down; Belden tells the crew the kindest thing in the night was the distance they kept, which is a strange sentence to be proud of forever, and they are'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='cornering the frightened clerk at the hatch; the kindest voice in the crew says his name, and Jory Vance comes up off his knees like a startled hare, lantern swinging shadows up the freight car walls'>>

choices.label: Hold still and try to calm him.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='no chase, every junior stone-still, but he is past hearing; he jams the panel shut, pockets the loose screws, and is gone up-train into the passenger crowd before the junction's first lamp slides past the glass'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=108 beats='at Highpass Junction the panel hides its seam again and the cause is now a story about a boy who ran; Marsh will not spend the the recovery order on it, and the night cable-liner rolls at 12:21 still carrying the archive; Belden takes the blame onto her own page for posting juniors at a door, teaches the third rule again on the cold platform, and boards at Farrow Notch to sit with Jory Vance through the small hours; the crates come home days later on his testimony, bought at the price of one bad minute at a vestibule door'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the post held; the report travels the corridor hand to hand in Belden's taught form, what, where, when, and nothing else; the train begins its long brake for the junction'>>

choices.label: Give your report at the door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='Belden witnesses from the glass herself, then carries report and juniors to the platform where Marsh stands with the the recovery order; the sighting, timed and doubled, is cause with its boots on'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=104 beats='the freight car opened in good order, the panel, the crates, the clerk collected quietly at the far door where he had hoped to slip down; the tally done under the relay mast by 12:18; Belden's cocoa verdict, that a watch which holds its post writes half the recovery, and the half it writes is the half that holds in court'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the corridor board's oddity laid on Feld's desk: a sealed through-car listed for the Aqueduct water-stop siding, which is a stop where engines drink, not where freight wanders'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='someone plans a transfer at Highpass Junction, onto a loaded sledge with two porters the union has clocked at the siding all week; Feld's puzzlement over the amended board is the first unrehearsed thing his face has done all night; the guard's van telegraph can warn Marsh now, minutes mattering, or the crew can verify first by having the brakeman pull and read the actual siding order before crying wolf on a forged board'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the guard's van telegraph tapping the warning south, TRANSFER PLANNED WATER STOP SIDING CAR NINE; Marsh's acknowledgment comes back in a stationmistress's fist, one word, HELD'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='Highpass Junction at 11:57; from the vestibule steps the crew sees a loaded sledge with two porters at the siding, two hired porters and empty crates sized to swallow other crates, exactly the shape of the warning'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the constable strolls to the cart and asks the porters, politely, on whose order they wait; the paper they show names the the Ridge Office, Highpass Gate, and the the recovery order has its second thread'>>

<<FILL role=success words=112 beats='cause from the board and cause from the cart with the the recovery order between them; car six opens at 12:10, panel, crates, ledger, and Jory Vance found sitting with the deeds, grazing rights, and the founding roll; the porters, blameless and paid in advance, help load the archive onto their own cart for the ride to the strongroom, which even Marsh allows is tidy; the night cable-liner rolls one lie lighter'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='the brakeman pulls the siding order from the van clip; real paper in a forged fist, the amendment written in the same hand as car six's manifest copy, stroke for stroke'>>

choices.label: Match the hands line by line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='careful minutes spent matching the forged fist while Larkspur Relay falls behind; the proof turns solid as track, but the warning wire goes out short of Aqueduct with the junction already in sight'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=98 beats='the transfer never happens, the cart stands down, and Highpass Junction passes in watchfulness rather than recovery, the panel unfound tonight; but the forged order in the union's hands is the court's favorite exhibit by Friday, the one paper tying clerk, board, and the Ridge Office in a single fist; the crew learns that verifying can cost an evening and win a case, and that both halves of that sentence are true at once'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the word passed on a folded napkin in Belden's taught form; she drifts to the brakeman's table with her coffee and her country manners, and the juniors keep the table and the watch'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='Belden agreeing with the brakeman about grades and about management, in that order; the story arriving on its own, that Feld signed for car six sight unseen at Central, which in forty years he has never once done'>>

choices.label: Hold the table and log the room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='Belden works the grumble gently while the crew logs the room, who rides which car, who checks the corridor board, who eats standing; the parlor car turns into a map with soup on it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='Belden slides back with the story confirmed and hands the juniors the counting work that wins parleys: walk the corridor and count the sealed cars against the board, looking for seals that disagree with themselves, or sit tight and map who moves between cars in the hour before the junction'>>

choices.label: Count the seals on the cars.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the corridor walked end to end with tickets in hand, counting like mapmakers, seals against listings; most cars agree with themselves, the way honest paper does'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='car six does not: a yard seal crimped over a company seal, double-sealed the way nothing honest ever is, and the crimp's date three nights old, the the Record Hall's bad night'>>

choices.label: Time it and write it down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the count written in the taught form, timed and signed by two juniors, handed to Belden as the brakes come on for Aqueduct; on the platform it passes from her hand to Marsh's'>>

choices.label: Present the count at the junction.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=118 beats='a doubled seal with the right bad date is cause a magistrate can love; the the recovery order opens car six at 12:08 and the night unpacks in order, panel, crates, ledger, clerk; Belden gives the crew the whole cocoa sermon in one line, that counting is the humblest kind of courage and the hardest to argue with'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the aisle mapped from the corner table in small pencil marks; passengers ebb, the brakeman naps, and at 11:20 and again at 11:44 Jory Vance passes forward with his lantern, checking on something that owns him'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the marks make a shape: he checks the panel on the quarter hour before every station; a frightened man is a clock, and the crew has read his time'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='Belden reads the notebook, taps the 12:15 mark that has not happened yet, and carries the prediction to the platform for Marsh to spend as she sees fit'>>

choices.label: Watch the quarter hour prove you right.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=108 beats='the adults choose to watch rather than open, and at 12:15 Jory Vance walks his circuit into a ring of quiet lanterns and stops, caught by arithmetic; but the water runs out before the recovery order and panel and tally can all be done, and the night cable-liner rolls with the archive aboard for the ridge line wardens, wired ahead, to lift out at dawn on the prediction's proof; the crew discovers their notebook riding south in the mail like a small lawman, doing the work by post'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the sorting car off the baggage car, waybills on the hook swinging with the grade; the mail clerk sorting under green glass, glad of quiet company that touches nothing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='the waybills read from the hook without a finger laid on them, mapmaker discipline; coal, mail, milled glass, each sheet agreeing with itself until car six's does not'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=128 beats='car six's waybill reads wrong to a junior's nose before it reads wrong to the eye, fresh ink on an old form, a copy passing as an original; the forged manifest slip is a thread with two pulls: carry it straight to Belden and let the parley have it while the night is young, or ask the mail clerk's leave to set it against his the carbon ledger, where every original leaves its shadow'>>

choices.label: Ask to check the carbon ledger.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the forged manifest slip carried back through three swaying cars, held flat in a timetable so the night air cannot crease the evidence'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='Belden reads it twice and holds it to the lamp where the form's watermark should sit and does not; her face does the thing it does before a strong parley, which is nothing at all'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='Belden reads the forged manifest slip twice, holds it to the lamp where the watermark should sit and does not, and asks the juniors, straight-faced, for counsel, because talkers who never weigh are only mouths: open the parley early at Larkspur Relay and spend surprise while the thieves think themselves unseen, or hold to the union's clock and land everything at Aqueduct where the recovery order, stationmistress, and constable stand waiting'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the office parley opened at 11:10 with the forged manifest slip on the desk; Feld's courtesy survives it, barely; up the corridor a door closes too carefully, a frightened clerk gone to check his panel off schedule'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='Belden neither chases nor raises her voice; she posts herself in the corridor between Jory Vance and nowhere, coffee in hand, and talks to the air about writs and witnesses and boys who get one good door a night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='at Larkspur Relay the mail swings aboard under lamplight; by the time the arches fall behind, Jory Vance is sitting across from Belden with his lantern out, telling it in order, and Feld is writing his own statement unasked'>>

<<FILL role=success words=104 beats='the night cable-liner reaches Aqueduct with its confession already made; the the recovery order is nearly a formality, the panel opened by the clerk who built its secret, the crates tallied by half past midnight; Belden's verdict, that surprise is a tool you may use exactly once a night, and she is glad it was spent on mercy; the archive rides home with two witnesses who chose the union's side of the aisle'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='certainty chosen; hours in hand, and Belden spends them the way planners spend towers, on preparation; the crew learns what a parley rehearsal is by being in one'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=132 beats='one hour left and two right answers; Belden can drill the crew by playing Feld, taking his courteous evasions in turn until every answer has an answer, or the crew can build the log of watches, every observation of the night written timed and signed, the paper spine of a parley; both win differently'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='Belden plays Feld better than Feld, tea-pour and all; the crew learns where the courtesies bend and which question has no courteous answer, the blank consignee asked with the forged manifest slip already on the desk'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='at Highpass Junction the parley runs like a timetable, question, paper, question; Feld's answers arrive exactly where the rehearsal said they would, and he sets his keys on the desk between them himself'>>

choices.label: Walk with him to car six.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=success words=112 beats='the man-door, the panel, the three oilcloth chests in lamplight; Jory Vance gathered gently at the far door; the night cable-liner away at 12:21 with the tally already signed; Belden tells the crew that every easy-looking parley is a rehearsed one, and lets them carry the the recovery order's case back to Marsh's office as the fee'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the log of watches built line by disciplined line, boarding to now, every seal, listing, and careful hand, each entry timed and signed by two; talkers' work that planners would frame'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=104 beats='at the junction the sheet lies beside the the recovery order on Marsh's platform desk and makes the cause look like what it is, a night's honest watching; Feld reads the twentieth line, the one holding his own unread signature, and stands aside without a word'>>

choices.label: File the sheet with the the recovery order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='car six opens to paper it cannot argue with; panel, crates, the founding roll home; the magistrate later staples the log of watches to the the recovery order itself as the model of cause brought right, and Belden reads the union's juniors the court's one-line compliment at the next hall meeting, twice, because some pay is worth hearing twice'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='permission asked properly and granted; the carbon ledger opens under the green lamp, every original's carbon shadow kept in order of booking'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='car six's true shadow is there, and it is not the hook's copy: the original waybill was made out to the the Ridge Office, Highpass Gate, consignee the the Broker, booking paid in coin at Central'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=122 beats='the carbon shadow is cause, but it lives in the clerk's book and the book is his charge; the differences run six lies long, hook against book, and the clerk has gone quiet and angry in his tidy way, forged paper being personal in a mail car; copy the page by hand with him watching, slow and sure, keeping his trust and his book aboard, or ask the bolder thing, that he close the book, bring it, and testify himself at Highpass Junction'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the page copied in a mapmaker's careful print, every figure checked back twice, the clerk initialing each line as true copy; slow work with the junction growing in the window'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='Belden carries the initialed copy forward; at Highpass Junction it lies beside the the recovery order, and the clerk's initials give it a spine no courtesy can bend'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Feld reads the the Ridge Office line and the coin-paid booking and asks no questions at all; the man-door opens at 12:11 with the lantern swinging clear of the pylon still swinging overhead'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=118 beats='panel, crates, ledger, clerk; the recovery in good order and the mail car's book never once out of its keeper's hands; Belden's cocoa lesson runs that evidence borrowed politely is evidence twice, once for what it says and once for how it was got, and the second half is the half that lasts'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the bold ask, made respectfully; the mail clerk looks at his book, at the forged hook copy, and shuts the book with a snap that means yes; forgery in a mail car, he says, is a thing a man testifies about'>>

choices.label: Walk him through what to expect.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='Belden walks him through the platform parley like a conductor calling stations; the juniors carry his flimsy box and his umbrella, which he brings, because dignity'>>

choices.label: Stand with him at the desk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='at Marsh's platform desk the clerk lays the open book beside the hook copy and says, for the record, which one the mails stand behind; the the recovery order does the rest while the boiler drinks'>>

<<FILL role=success words=108 beats='car six opens on the word of the man whose job is knowing which paper is true; panel, crates, the founding roll untied under the relay mast lamp; Jory Vance, hearing the mails themselves had spoken, gives up the the Ridge Office name before he is asked; Belden tells the crew that the strongest voice in any parley is a witness who came because he was asked well, and the clerk rides home with the archive like a man escorting the post'>>
